candidate_problem_record.subject: science
candidate_problem_record.raw_question_text: The table shows values of $f'$, the derivative of function $f$. Although $f'$ is continuous over all real numbers, only selected values of $f'$ are shown. If $f'$ has exactly two real zeros, then $f$ is increasing over which of the following intervals?
candidate_problem_record.multi_solution_policy_rationale: 该数据集更可能以单解题为主，不强推多解 agent，只保留基础可验证性与可标注性检查。
